title: helichrysum revolutum
intro: Helichrysum revolutum, also known as the golden everlasting daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum revolutum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
